Program.cs.\r\n- Preserve existing class names and property names as much as possible.\r\n- Keep the domain model compatible with existing code from Lab 2.\r\n\r\nApply these EF-ready rules:\r\n- Add using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations where needed.\r\n- Add using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema where needed.\r\n- Add [Key] to every Id property.\r\n- Navigation reference properties should be virtual.\r\n- Collection navigation properties should be virtual ICollection<T>, not List<T>.\r\n- Initialize collection navigation properties using new List<T>() or new HashSet<T>().\r\n- Add [ForeignKey(nameof(...))] on foreign key properties where relationships exist.\r\n- Keep the model read/write friendly for EF Core.\r\n\r\nExpected relationships:\r\n- Category 1-N Product\r\n- Supplier 1-N Product\r\n- Product N-N Warehouse through InventoryItem\r\n- Warehouse 1-N InventoryItem\r\n- Product 1-N InventoryItem\r\n- User 1-N Order\r\n- Order N-N Product set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Description { get; set; }\n        public decimal Price { get; set; }\n        public string UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }\n        public int MinimumStock { get; set; }\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n        public bool IsActive { get; set; }\n        public ProductType Type { get; set; }\n\n        public Category Category { get; set; }\n        public Supplier Supplier { get; set; }\n\n        public List<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; }\n        public List<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; }\n\n        public Product()\n        {\n            OrderItems = new List<OrderItem>();\n            InventoryItems = new List<InventoryItem>();\n        }\n    }\n}","newString":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Enums;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.Domain.Models\n{\n    public class Product\n    {\n        [Key]\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Description { get; set; }\n        public decimal Price { get; set; }\n        public string UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }\n        public int MinimumStock { get; set; }\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n        public bool IsActive { get; set; }\n        public ProductType Type { get; set; }\n\n        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }\n        [ForeignKey(nameof(Category))]\n        public virtual Category Category { get; set; }\n\n        public int? SupplierId { get; set; }\n        [ForeignKey(nameof(Supplier))]\n        public virtual Supplier Supplier { get; set; }\n\n        public virtual ICollection<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; } = new HashSet<OrderItem>();\n        public virtual ICollection<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; } = new HashSet<InventoryItem>();\n\n        public Product()\n        {\n            OrderItems = new HashSet<OrderItem>();\n            InventoryItems = new HashSet<InventoryItem>();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01YVgXzZGU8nL44poGqLvpK3__vscode-1778154348960","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL\n{\n    public class InventoryManagementDbContext : DbContext\n    {\n        public InventoryManagementDbContext(DbContextOptions<InventoryManagementDbContext> options)\n            : base(options)\n        {\n        }\n\n        // DbSet properties for all entities\n        public DbSet<Product> Products { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Category> Categories { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Supplier> Suppliers { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Warehouse> Warehouses { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<User> Users { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Order> Orders { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; }\n\n        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n        {\n            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n            // Configure Product entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .Property(p => p.Price)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure Order entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Order>()\n                .Property(o => o.TotalPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure OrderItem entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.UnitPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.TotalPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.Discount)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure InventoryItem unique constraint on ProductId + WarehouseId\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasIndex(ii => new { ii.ProductId, ii.WarehouseId })\n                .IsUnique();\n\n            // Configure relationships if needed\n            // Category 1-N Product (already defined in Product via CategoryId FK)\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .HasOne(p => p.Category)\n                .WithMany(c => c.Products)\n                .HasForeignKey(p => p.CategoryId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.SetNull);\n\n            // Supplier 1-N Product (already defined in Product via SupplierId FK)\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .HasOne(p => p.Supplier)\n                .WithMany(s => s.Products)\n                .HasForeignKey(p => p.SupplierId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.SetNull);\n\n            // Warehouse 1-N InventoryItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasOne(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .WithMany(w => w.InventoryItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(ii => ii.WarehouseId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Product 1-N InventoryItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasOne(ii => ii.Product)\n                .WithMany(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(ii => ii.ProductId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // User 1-N Order\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Order>()\n                .HasOne(o => o.User)\n                .WithMany(u => u.Orders)\n                .HasForeignKey(o => o.UserId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Order 1-N OrderItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .HasOne(oi => oi.Order)\n                .WithMany(o => o.OrderItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(oi => oi.OrderId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Product 1-N OrderItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .HasOne(oi => oi.Product)\n                .WithMany(p => p.OrderItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(oi => oi.ProductId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Text;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL\n{\n
